# As of 2026, AI answer engines mainly use crawlable pages + schema.
# This file is an optional map for agents — keep it short and accurate.

# Dekoratiivseinad OÜ
> Walls and bathroom construction & finishing in Estonia: microcement (mikrotsement), bathroom renovation, decorative wall finishes (clay plaster, lime plaster, tadelakt).

## Primary pages
- [Home (Estonian)](https://dekoratiivseinad.ee/): Default locale
- [Home (English)](https://dekoratiivseinad.ee/en/): English
- [Home (Russian)](https://dekoratiivseinad.ee/ru/): Russian
- [Contact / quote](https://dekoratiivseinad.ee/#kontakt): Request a quote
- [Services](https://dekoratiivseinad.ee/#teenused): Microcement, bathroom renovation, decorative finishes
- [Work](https://dekoratiivseinad.ee/#tood): Before/after project photos
- [FAQ](https://dekoratiivseinad.ee/#kkk): Common questions

## Correct terminology
- Use **microcement / mikrotsement** (not “mikrobetoonkrohv”)
- Company: Dekoratiivseinad OÜ
- Market: Estonia

## Contact
- Site: https://dekoratiivseinad.ee/
- Email: info@dekoratiivseinad.ee
